creator: bruth@wmht.org
text:
Ntop 1.1 dumps core when using the web reporting function upon connection of a web browser.

Fix: 

Unknown.
How-To-Repeat: Become root
./ntop -w 501
Goto a web browser and goto http://localhost:501 or connect from another machine
You will get some info and then it dies. A core file will be on the ntop machine.
